NAVAREA XIX 159/22

 1. RIGLIST. CORRECT AT  171830 UTC NOV 22

 NORWEGIAN SEA: NORTH OF 65N, EAST OF 5W.

 65-01.8N 006-36.1E TRANSOCEAN ENCOURAGE
 65-27.7N 007-27.3E DEEPSEA STAVANGER
 71-24,1N 022-30,5E TRANSOCEAN ENABLER
 NOTES:

 A. RIGS ARE PROTECTED BY A 500 METRE SAFETY ZONE.

 B. FOR RIGS LOCATED SOUTH OF 65N, REFER TO NAVAREA I WARNINGS OR VISIT WWW.UKHO.GOV.UK/RNW

 2. CANCEL NAVAREA XIX　154/22
